assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends Rapid release channel instead of Stable or Extended, which contradicts the expectation for minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response shows maintenanceExclusions with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' to block upgrades during training periods

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response configures a Sunday 10 AM UTC, 8-hour maintenance window which is a narrow, predictable weekend window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response clearly shows a multi-pool strategy with separate 'h100-training-pool' and 'system-pool' for different workload types

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' for the training pool and shows manual upgrade control with gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response does not mention checkpointing or job resumption capabilities in the training framework configuration

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: The response does not discuss GPU driver version testing or staging validation procedures

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking or version compatibility requirements
